name: Gigabot Run
short_description: Gigabot Run is a fast-paced non-stop action game that will challenge your skills
detailed_description:
It’s time for something new! Help GigaBot get home in this fast-paced non-stop action game that will challenge your reflexes. Use a game pad, keyboard, mouse, or touch screen with the customizable on-screen controls to guide GigaBot past enemies and obstacles. GigaBot Run features a normal mode and a challenge mode.

BASICS

Once the level starts, GigaBot starts to run and never stops. Maneuver your way past enemies and obstacles to reach the exit. Start with the maximum score and lose points with every wrong action.

NORMAL MODE

Embark on an adventure to help GigaBot get home. Every level completed in normal mode is unlocked for challenge mode.

CHALLENGE MODE

Replay every level with the ability to increase your score multiplier by increasing your speed. Show the world your gamer skills and climb the leaderboards by adjusting your speed to ridiculously high levels!

DIFFICULTY

This game starts easy and gets harder with each world. You can beat every level with a low score but you will need to harness your gamer skills to get the ultimate leaderboard score. Levels are mastered by replaying them and learning how to navigate past the enemies and obstacles. For more difficulty, challenge mode offers an intense and fun way to play.

FEATURES

• Full controller support
• Keyboard support
• Mouse and touch screen support with customizable on-screen controls
• Fast paced non-stop action
• Awesome soundtrack
• Leaderboards
• Achievements
